name: Morgan Stanley Depositary Shares each representing 1/1000th of a share of 4.875% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series L
summary: Morgan Stanley Depositary Shares each representing 1/1000th of a share of 4.875% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series L, represents fractional ownership in Morgan Stanley's preferred stock. The Series L preferred stock pays a fixed dividend of 4.875%. The dividends are non-cumulative, which means any unpaid dividends do not accrue.
